items.name: --help
items.description: print usage and exit

items.name: --version
items.description: show version and build info

items.name: --cache-list
items.description: show list of models in cache

items.name: --completion-bash
items.description: print source-able bash completion script for llama.cpp

items.name: --threads
items.description:
number of CPU threads to use during generation (default: -1)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_THREADS)

items.name: --threads-batch
items.description: number of threads to use during batch and prompt processing (default: same as --threads)

items.name: --cpu-mask
items.description: CPU affinity mask: arbitrarily long hex. Complements cpu-range (default: "")

items.name: --cpu-range
items.description: range of CPUs for affinity. Complements --cpu-mask

items.name: --prio
items.description: set process/thread priority : low(-1), normal(0), medium(1), high(2), realtime(3) (default: 0)

items.name: --poll
items.description: use polling level to wait for work (0 - no polling, default: 50)

items.name: --cpu-mask-batch
items.description: CPU affinity mask: arbitrarily long hex. Complements cpu-range-batch (default: same as --cpu-mask)

items.name: --cpu-range-batch
items.description: ranges of CPUs for affinity. Complements --cpu-mask-batch

items.name: --prio-batch
items.description: set process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime (default: 0)

items.name: --ctx-size
items.description:
size of the prompt context (default: 0, 0 = loaded from model)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CTX_SIZE)

items.name: --predict
items.description:
number of tokens to predict (default: -1, -1 = infinity)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_N_PREDICT)

items.name: --batch-size
items.description:
logical maximum batch size (default: 2048)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_BATCH)

items.name: --ubatch-size
items.description:
physical maximum batch size (default: 512)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_UBATCH)

items.name: --keep
items.description: number of tokens to keep from the initial prompt (default: 0, -1 = all)

items.name: --swa-full
items.description:
use full-size SWA cache (default: false)
[(more info)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/13194#issuecomment-2868343055)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SWA_FULL)

items.name: --flash-attn
items.description: off\

items.name: --perf
items.description:
whether to enable internal libllama performance timings (default: false)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_PERF)

items.name: --escape
items.description: whether to process escapes sequences (\n, \r, \t, \', \", \\) (default: true)

items.name: --rope-scaling
items.description:
RoPE frequency scaling method, defaults to linear unless specified by the model
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ROPE_SCALING_TYPE)

items.name: --rope-scale
items.description:
RoPE context scaling factor, expands context by a factor of N
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ROPE_SCALE)

items.name: --rope-freq-base
items.description:
RoPE base frequency, used by NTK-aware scaling (default: loaded from model)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ROPE_FREQ_BASE)

items.name: --rope-freq-scale
items.description:
RoPE frequency scaling factor, expands context by a factor of 1/N
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ROPE_FREQ_SCALE)

items.name: --yarn-orig-ctx
items.description:
YaRN: original context size of model (default: 0 = model training context size)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_YARN_ORIG_CTX)

items.name: --yarn-ext-factor
items.description:
YaRN: extrapolation mix factor (default: -1.00, 0.0 = full interpolation)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_YARN_EXT_FACTOR)

items.name: --yarn-attn-factor
items.description:
YaRN: scale sqrt(t) or attention magnitude (default: -1.00)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_YARN_ATTN_FACTOR)

items.name: --yarn-beta-slow
items.description:
YaRN: high correction dim or alpha (default: -1.00)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_YARN_BETA_SLOW)

items.name: --yarn-beta-fast
items.description:
YaRN: low correction dim or beta (default: -1.00)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_YARN_BETA_FAST)

items.name: --kv-offload
items.description:
whether to enable KV cache offloading (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_KV_OFFLOAD)

items.name: --repack
items.description:
whether to enable weight repacking (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_REPACK)

items.name: --no-host
items.description:
bypass host buffer allowing extra buffers to be used
(env: LLAMA_ARG_NO_HOST)

items.name: --cache-type-k
items.description:
KV cache data type for K
allowed values: f32, f16, bf16, q8_0, q4_0, q4_1, iq4_nl, q5_0, q5_1
(default: f16)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_TYPE_K)

items.name: --cache-type-v
items.description:
KV cache data type for V
allowed values: f32, f16, bf16, q8_0, q4_0, q4_1, iq4_nl, q5_0, q5_1
(default: f16)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_TYPE_V)

items.name: --defrag-thold
items.description:
KV cache defragmentation threshold (DEPRECATED)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DEFRAG_THOLD)

items.name: --mlock
items.description:
force system to keep model in RAM rather than swapping or compressing
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MLOCK)

items.name: --mmap
items.description:
whether to memory-map model. (if mmap disabled, slower load but may reduce pageouts if not using mlock) (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MMAP)

items.name: --direct-io
items.description:
use DirectIO if available. (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DIO)

items.name: --numa
items.description:
attempt optimizations that help on some NUMA systems
- distribute: spread execution evenly over all nodes
- isolate: only spawn threads on CPUs on the node that execution started on
- numactl: use the CPU map provided by numactl
if run without this previously, it is recommended to drop the system page cache before using this
see https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/issues/1437
(env: LLAMA_ARG_NUMA)

items.name: --device
items.description:
comma-separated list of devices to use for offloading (none = don't offload)
use --list-devices to see a list of available devices
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DEVICE)

items.name: --list-devices
items.description: print list of available devices and exit

items.name: --override-tensor
items.description:
override tensor buffer type
(env: LLAMA_ARG_OVERRIDE_TENSOR)

items.name: --cpu-moe
items.description:
keep all Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights in the CPU
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CPU_MOE)

items.name: --n-cpu-moe
items.description:
keep the Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights of the first N layers in the CPU
(env: LLAMA_ARG_N_CPU_MOE)

items.name: --gpu-layers
items.description:
max. number of layers to store in VRAM, either an exact number, 'auto', or 'all' (default: auto)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_N_GPU_LAYERS)

items.name: --split-mode
items.description:
how to split the model across multiple GPUs, one of:
- none: use one GPU only
- layer (default): split layers and KV across GPUs (pipelined)
- row: split weight across GPUs by rows (parallelized)
- tensor: split weights and KV across GPUs (parallelized, EXPERIMENTAL)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPLIT_MODE)

items.name: --tensor-split
items.description:
fraction of the model to offload to each GPU, comma-separated list of proportions, e.g. 3,1
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TENSOR_SPLIT)

items.name: --main-gpu
items.description:
the GPU to use for the model (with split-mode = none), or for intermediate results and KV (with split-mode = row) (default: 0)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MAIN_GPU)

items.name: --fit
items.description: off]`

items.name: --fit-target
items.description:
target margin per device for --fit, comma-separated list of values, single value is broadcast across all devices, default: 1024
(env: LLAMA_ARG_FIT_TARGET)

items.name: --fit-ctx
items.description:
minimum ctx size that can be set by --fit option, default: 4096
(env: LLAMA_ARG_FIT_CTX)

items.name: --check-tensors
items.description: check model tensor data for invalid values (default: false)

items.name: --override-kv
items.description:
advanced option to override model metadata by key. to specify multiple overrides, either use comma-separated values.
types: int, float, bool, str. example: --override-kv tokenizer.ggml.add_bos_token=bool:false,tokenizer.ggml.add_eos_token=bool:false

items.name: --op-offload
items.description: whether to offload host tensor operations to device (default: true)

items.name: --lora
items.description: path to LoRA adapter (use comma-separated values to load multiple adapters)

items.name: --lora-scaled
items.description:
path to LoRA adapter with user defined scaling (format: FNAME:SCALE,...)
note: use comma-separated values

items.name: --control-vector
items.description:
add a control vector
note: use comma-separated values to add multiple control vectors

items.name: --control-vector-scaled
items.description:
add a control vector with user defined scaling SCALE
note: use comma-separated values (format: FNAME:SCALE,...)

items.name: --control-vector-layer-range
items.description: layer range to apply the control vector(s) to, start and end inclusive

items.name: --model
items.description:
model path to load
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODEL)

items.name: --model-url
items.description:
model download url (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODEL_URL)

items.name: --docker-repo
items.description:
Docker Hub model repository. repo is optional, default to ai/. quant is optional, default to :latest.
example: gemma3
(default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DOCKER_REPO)

items.name: --hf-repo
items.description:
Hugging Face model repository; quant is optional, case-insensitive, default to Q4_K_M, or falls back to the first file in the repo if Q4_K_M doesn't exist.
mmproj is also downloaded automatically if available. to disable, add --no-mmproj
example: ggml-org/GLM-4.7-Flash-GGUF:Q4_K_M
(default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_HF_REPO)

items.name: --hf-file
items.description:
Hugging Face model file. If specified, it will override the quant in --hf-repo (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_HF_FILE)

items.name: --hf-repo-v
items.description:
Hugging Face model repository for the vocoder model (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_HF_REPO_V)

items.name: --hf-file-v
items.description:
Hugging Face model file for the vocoder model (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_HF_FILE_V)

items.name: --hf-token
items.description:
Hugging Face access token (default: value from HF_TOKEN environment variable)
(env: HF_TOKEN)

items.name: --log-disable
items.description: Log disable

items.name: --log-file
items.description:
Log to file
(env: LLAMA_ARG_LOG_FILE)

items.name: --log-colors
items.description: off\

items.name: --verbose
items.description: Set verbosity level to infinity (i.e. log all messages, useful for debugging)

items.name: --offline
items.description:
Offline mode: forces use of cache, prevents network access
(env: LLAMA_ARG_OFFLINE)

items.name: --verbosity
items.description:
Set the verbosity threshold. Messages with a higher verbosity will be ignored. Values:
- 0: generic output
- 1: error
- 2: warning
- 3: info
- 4: trace (more info)
- 5: debug
(default: 3)

(env: LLAMA_ARG_LOG_VERBOSITY)

items.name: --log-prefix
items.description:
Enable prefix in log messages
(env: LLAMA_ARG_LOG_PREFIX)

items.name: --log-timestamps
items.description:
Enable timestamps in log messages
(env: LLAMA_ARG_LOG_TIMESTAMPS)

items.name: --spec-draft-type-k
items.description:
KV cache data type for K for the draft model
allowed values: f32, f16, bf16, q8_0, q4_0, q4_1, iq4_nl, q5_0, q5_1
(default: f16)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_CACHE_TYPE_K)

items.name: --spec-draft-type-v
items.description:
KV cache data type for V for the draft model
allowed values: f32, f16, bf16, q8_0, q4_0, q4_1, iq4_nl, q5_0, q5_1
(default: f16)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_CACHE_TYPE_V)

items.name: --samplers
items.description:
samplers that will be used for generation in the order, separated by ';'
(default: penalties;dry;top_n_sigma;top_k;typ_p;top_p;min_p;xtc;temperature)

items.name: --seed
items.description: RNG seed (default: -1, use random seed for -1)

items.name: --sampler-seq
items.description: simplified sequence for samplers that will be used (default: edskypmxt)

items.name: --ignore-eos
items.description: ignore end of stream token and continue generating (implies --logit-bias EOS-inf)

items.name: --temp
items.description: temperature (default: 0.80)

items.name: --top-k
items.description:
top-k sampling (default: 40, 0 = disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TOP_K)

items.name: --top-p
items.description: top-p sampling (default: 0.95, 1.0 = disabled)

items.name: --min-p
items.description: min-p sampling (default: 0.05, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --top-nsigma
items.description: top-n-sigma sampling (default: -1.00, -1.0 = disabled)

items.name: --xtc-probability
items.description: xtc probability (default: 0.00, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --xtc-threshold
items.description: xtc threshold (default: 0.10, 1.0 = disabled)

items.name: --typical
items.description: locally typical sampling, parameter p (default: 1.00, 1.0 = disabled)

items.name: --repeat-last-n
items.description: last n tokens to consider for penalize (default: 64, 0 = disabled, -1 = ctx_size)

items.name: --repeat-penalty
items.description: penalize repeat sequence of tokens (default: 1.00, 1.0 = disabled)

items.name: --presence-penalty
items.description: repeat alpha presence penalty (default: 0.00, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --frequency-penalty
items.description: repeat alpha frequency penalty (default: 0.00, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --dry-multiplier
items.description: set DRY sampling multiplier (default: 0.00, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --dry-base
items.description: set DRY sampling base value (default: 1.75)

items.name: --dry-allowed-length
items.description: set allowed length for DRY sampling (default: 2)

items.name: --dry-penalty-last-n
items.description: set DRY penalty for the last n tokens (default: -1, 0 = disable, -1 = context size)

items.name: --dry-sequence-breaker
items.description: add sequence breaker for DRY sampling, clearing out default breakers ('\n', ':', '"', '*') in the process; use "none" to not use any sequence breakers

items.name: --adaptive-target
items.description:
adaptive-p: select tokens near this probability (valid range 0.0 to 1.0; negative = disabled) (default: -1.00)
[(more info)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/17927)

items.name: --adaptive-decay
items.description:
adaptive-p: decay rate for target adaptation over time. lower values are more reactive, higher values are more stable.
(valid range 0.0 to 0.99) (default: 0.90)

items.name: --dynatemp-range
items.description: dynamic temperature range (default: 0.00, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --dynatemp-exp
items.description: dynamic temperature exponent (default: 1.00)

items.name: --mirostat
items.description:
use Mirostat sampling.
Top K, Nucleus and Locally Typical samplers are ignored if used.
(default: 0, 0 = disabled, 1 = Mirostat, 2 = Mirostat 2.0)

items.name: --mirostat-lr
items.description: Mirostat learning rate, parameter eta (default: 0.10)

items.name: --mirostat-ent
items.description: Mirostat target entropy, parameter tau (default: 5.00)

items.name: --logit-bias
items.description:
modifies the likelihood of token appearing in the completion,
i.e. `--logit-bias 15043+1` to increase likelihood of token ' Hello',
or `--logit-bias 15043-1` to decrease likelihood of token ' Hello'

items.name: --grammar
items.description: BNF-like grammar to constrain generations (see samples in grammars/ dir)

items.name: --grammar-file
items.description: file to read grammar from

items.name: --json-schema
items.description:
JSON schema to constrain generations (https://json-schema.org/), e.g. `{}` for any JSON object
For schemas w/ external $refs, use --grammar + example/json_schema_to_grammar.py instead

items.name: --json-schema-file
items.description:
File containing a JSON schema to constrain generations (https://json-schema.org/), e.g. `{}` for any JSON object
For schemas w/ external $refs, use --grammar + example/json_schema_to_grammar.py instead

items.name: --backend-sampling
items.description:
enable backend sampling (experimental) (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_BACKEND_SAMPLING)

items.name: --lookup-cache-static
items.description: path to static lookup cache to use for lookup decoding (not updated by generation)

items.name: --lookup-cache-dynamic
items.description: path to dynamic lookup cache to use for lookup decoding (updated by generation)

items.name: --ctx-checkpoints
items.description:
max number of context checkpoints to create per slot (default: 32)[(more info)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/15293)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CTX_CHECKPOINTS)

items.name: --checkpoint-min-step
items.description:
minimum spacing between context checkpoints in tokens (default: 256, 0 = no minimum)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CHECKPOINT_MIN_SPACING_NT)

items.name: --cache-ram
items.description:
set the maximum cache size in MiB (default: 8192, -1 - no limit, 0 - disable)[(more info)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/16391)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_RAM)

items.name: --kv-unified
items.description:
use single unified KV buffer shared across all sequences (default: enabled if number of slots is auto)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_KV_UNIFIED)

items.name: --cache-idle-slots
items.description:
save idle slots to the prompt cache on new task, and clear them when using unified KV (default: enabled, requires cache-ram)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_IDLE_SLOTS)

items.name: --context-shift
items.description:
whether to use context shift on infinite text generation (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CONTEXT_SHIFT)

items.name: --reverse-prompt
items.description: halt generation at PROMPT, return control in interactive mode

items.name: --special
items.description: special tokens output enabled (default: false)

items.name: --warmup
items.description: whether to perform warmup with an empty run (default: enabled)

items.name: --spm-infill
items.description: use Suffix/Prefix/Middle pattern for infill (instead of Prefix/Suffix/Middle) as some models prefer this. (default: disabled)

items.name: --pooling
items.description:
pooling type for embeddings, use model default if unspecified
(env: LLAMA_ARG_POOLING)

items.name: --parallel
items.description:
number of server slots (default: -1, -1 = auto)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_N_PARALLEL)

items.name: --cont-batching
items.description:
whether to enable continuous batching (a.k.a dynamic batching) (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CONT_BATCHING)

items.name: --mmproj
items.description:
path to a multimodal projector file. see tools/mtmd/README.md
note: if -hf is used, this argument can be omitted
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MMPROJ)

items.name: --talker-model
items.description:
path to the qwen3-omni talker gguf, enables the /v1/audio/speech endpoint
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TALKER_MODEL)

items.name: --code2wav-model
items.description:
path to the qwen3-omni code2wav gguf, the talker code detokenizer
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CODE2WAV_MODEL)

items.name: --mmproj-url
items.description:
URL to a multimodal projector file. see tools/mtmd/README.md
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MMPROJ_URL)

items.name: --mmproj-auto
items.description:
whether to use multimodal projector file (if available), useful when using -hf (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MMPROJ_AUTO)

items.name: --mmproj-offload
items.description:
whether to enable GPU offloading for multimodal projector (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MMPROJ_OFFLOAD)

items.name: --image-min-tokens
items.description:
minimum number of tokens each image can take, only used by vision models with dynamic resolution (default: read from model)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_IMAGE_MIN_TOKENS)

items.name: --image-max-tokens
items.description:
maximum number of tokens each image can take, only used by vision models with dynamic resolution (default: read from model)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_IMAGE_MAX_TOKENS)

items.name: --alias
items.description:
set model name aliases, comma-separated (to be used by API)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ALIAS)

items.name: --tags
items.description:
set model tags, comma-separated (informational, not used for routing)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TAGS)

items.name: --embd-normalize
items.description: normalisation for embeddings (default: 2) (-1=none, 0=max absolute int16, 1=taxicab, 2=euclidean, >2=p-norm)

items.name: --host
items.description:
ip address to listen, or bind to an UNIX socket if the address ends with .sock (default: 127.0.0.1)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_HOST)

items.name: --port
items.description:
port to listen (default: 8080)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_PORT)

items.name: --reuse-port
items.description:
allow multiple sockets to bind to the same port (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_REUSE_PORT)

items.name: --path
items.description:
path to serve static files from (default: )
(env: LLAMA_ARG_STATIC_PATH)

items.name: --api-prefix
items.description:
prefix path the server serves from, without the trailing slash (default: )
(env: LLAMA_ARG_API_PREFIX)

items.name: --webui-config
items.description:
[DEPRECATED: use --ui-config] JSON that provides default WebUI settings (overrides WebUI defaults)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_WEBUI_CONFIG)

items.name: --ui-config
items.description:
JSON that provides default UI settings (overrides UI defaults)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_UI_CONFIG)

items.name: --webui-config-file
items.description:
[DEPRECATED: use --ui-config-file] JSON file that provides default WebUI settings (overrides WebUI defaults)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_WEBUI_CONFIG_FILE)

items.name: --ui-config-file
items.description:
JSON file that provides default UI settings (overrides UI defaults)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_UI_CONFIG_FILE)

items.name: --webui-mcp-proxy
items.description:
[DEPRECATED: use --ui-mcp-proxy/--no-ui-mcp-proxy] experimental: whether to enable MCP CORS proxy
(env: LLAMA_ARG_WEBUI_MCP_PROXY)

items.name: --ui-mcp-proxy
items.description:
experimental: whether to enable MCP CORS proxy - do not enable in untrusted environments (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_UI_MCP_PROXY)

items.name: --tools
items.description:
experimental: whether to enable built-in tools for AI agents - do not enable in untrusted environments (default: no tools)
specify "all" to enable all tools
available tools: read_file, file_glob_search, grep_search, exec_shell_command, write_file, edit_file, apply_diff, get_datetime
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TOOLS)

items.name: --webui
items.description:
[DEPRECATED: use --ui/--no-ui] whether to enable the Web UI
(env: LLAMA_ARG_WEBUI)

items.name: --ui
items.description:
whether to enable the Web UI (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_UI)

items.name: --embedding
items.description:
restrict to only support embedding use case; use only with dedicated embedding models (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_EMBEDDINGS)

items.name: --rerank
items.description:
enable reranking endpoint on server (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_RERANKING)

items.name: --api-key
items.description:
API key to use for authentication, multiple keys can be provided as a comma-separated list (default: none)
(env: LLAMA_API_KEY)

items.name: --api-key-file
items.description:
path to file containing API keys (default: none)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_API_KEY_FILE)

items.name: --ssl-key-file
items.description:
path to file a PEM-encoded SSL private key
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SSL_KEY_FILE)

items.name: --ssl-cert-file
items.description:
path to file a PEM-encoded SSL certificate
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SSL_CERT_FILE)

items.name: --chat-template-kwargs
items.description:
sets additional params for the json template parser, must be a valid json object string, e.g. '{"key1":"value1","key2":"value2"}'
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CHAT_TEMPLATE_KWARGS)

items.name: --timeout
items.description:
server read/write timeout in seconds (default: 3600)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_TIMEOUT)

items.name: --threads-http
items.description:
number of threads used to process HTTP requests (default: -1)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_THREADS_HTTP)

items.name: --cache-prompt
items.description:
whether to enable prompt caching (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_PROMPT)

items.name: --cache-reuse
items.description:
min chunk size to attempt reusing from the cache via KV shifting, requires prompt caching to be enabled (default: 0)
[(card)](https://ggml.ai/f0.png)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_REUSE)

items.name: --metrics
items.description:
enable prometheus compatible metrics endpoint (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ENDPOINT_METRICS)

items.name: --props
items.description:
enable changing global properties via POST /props (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ENDPOINT_PROPS)

items.name: --slots
items.description:
expose slots monitoring endpoint (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_ENDPOINT_SLOTS)

items.name: --slot-save-path
items.description: path to save slot kv cache (default: disabled)

items.name: --media-path
items.description: directory for loading local media files; files can be accessed via file:// URLs using relative paths (default: disabled)

items.name: --models-dir
items.description:
directory containing models for the router server (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODELS_DIR)

items.name: --models-preset
items.description:
path to INI file containing model presets for the router server (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODELS_PRESET)

items.name: --models-max
items.description:
for router server, maximum number of models to load simultaneously (default: 4, 0 = unlimited)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODELS_MAX)

items.name: --models-autoload
items.description:
for router server, whether to automatically load models (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_MODELS_AUTOLOAD)

items.name: --jinja
items.description:
whether to use jinja template engine for chat (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_JINJA)

items.name: --reasoning-format
items.description:
controls whether thought tags are allowed and/or extracted from the response, and in which format they're returned; one of:
- none: leaves thoughts unparsed in `message.content`
- deepseek: puts thoughts in `message.reasoning_content`
- deepseek-legacy: keeps `` tags in `message.content` while also populating `message.reasoning_content`
(default: auto)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_THINK)

items.name: --reasoning
items.description: off\

items.name: --reasoning-budget
items.description:
token budget for thinking: -1 for unrestricted, 0 for immediate end, N>0 for token budget (default: -1)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_THINK_BUDGET)

items.name: --reasoning-budget-message
items.description:
message injected before the end-of-thinking tag when reasoning budget is exhausted (default: none)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_THINK_BUDGET_MESSAGE)

items.name: --chat-template
items.description:
set custom jinja chat template (default: template taken from model's metadata)
if suffix/prefix are specified, template will be disabled
only commonly used templates are accepted (unless --jinja is set before this flag):
list of built-in templates:
bailing, bailing-think, bailing2, chatglm3, chatglm4, chatml, command-r, deepseek, deepseek-ocr, deepseek2, deepseek3, exaone-moe, exaone3, exaone4, falcon3, gemma, gigachat, glmedge, gpt-oss, granite, granite-4.0, granite-4.1, grok-2, hunyuan-dense, hunyuan-moe, hunyuan-vl, kimi-k2, llama2, llama2-sys, llama2-sys-bos, llama2-sys-strip, llama3, llama4, megrez, minicpm, mistral-v1, mistral-v3, mistral-v3-tekken, mistral-v7, mistral-v7-tekken, monarch, openchat, orion, pangu-embedded, phi3, phi4, rwkv-world, seed_oss, smolvlm, solar-open, vicuna, vicuna-orca, yandex, zephyr
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CHAT_TEMPLATE)

items.name: --chat-template-file
items.description:
set custom jinja chat template file (default: template taken from model's metadata)
if suffix/prefix are specified, template will be disabled
only commonly used templates are accepted (unless --jinja is set before this flag):
list of built-in templates:
bailing, bailing-think, bailing2, chatglm3, chatglm4, chatml, command-r, deepseek, deepseek-ocr, deepseek2, deepseek3, exaone-moe, exaone3, exaone4, falcon3, gemma, gigachat, glmedge, gpt-oss, granite, granite-4.0, granite-4.1, grok-2, hunyuan-dense, hunyuan-moe, hunyuan-vl, kimi-k2, llama2, llama2-sys, llama2-sys-bos, llama2-sys-strip, llama3, llama4, megrez, minicpm, mistral-v1, mistral-v3, mistral-v3-tekken, mistral-v7, mistral-v7-tekken, monarch, openchat, orion, pangu-embedded, phi3, phi4, rwkv-world, seed_oss, smolvlm, solar-open, vicuna, vicuna-orca, yandex, zephyr
(env: LLAMA_ARG_CHAT_TEMPLATE_FILE)

items.name: --skip-chat-parsing
items.description:
force a pure content parser, even if a Jinja template is specified; model will output everything in the content section, including any reasoning and/or tool calls (default: disabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SKIP_CHAT_PARSING)

items.name: --prefill-assistant
items.description:
whether to prefill the assistant's response if the last message is an assistant message (default: prefill enabled)
when this flag is set, if the last message is an assistant message then it will be treated as a full message and not prefilled

(env: LLAMA_ARG_PREFILL_ASSISTANT)

items.name: --slot-prompt-similarity
items.description: how much the prompt of a request must match the prompt of a slot in order to use that slot (default: 0.10, 0.0 = disabled)

items.name: --lora-init-without-apply
items.description: load LoRA adapters without applying them (apply later via POST /lora-adapters) (default: disabled)

items.name: --sleep-idle-seconds
items.description: number of seconds of idleness after which the server will sleep (default: -1; -1 = disabled)

items.name: --spec-draft-hf
items.description:
Same as --hf-repo, but for the draft model (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_HF_REPO)

items.name: --spec-draft-threads
items.description: number of threads to use during generation (default: same as --threads)

items.name: --spec-draft-threads-batch
items.description: number of threads to use during batch and prompt processing (default: same as --threads-draft)

items.name: --spec-draft-cpu-mask
items.description: Draft model CPU affinity mask. Complements cpu-range-draft (default: same as --cpu-mask)

items.name: --spec-draft-cpu-range
items.description: Ranges of CPUs for affinity. Complements --cpu-mask-draft

items.name: --spec-draft-prio
items.description: set draft process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime (default: 0)

items.name: --spec-draft-cpu-mask-batch
items.description: Draft model CPU affinity mask. Complements cpu-range-draft (default: same as --cpu-mask)

items.name: --spec-draft-prio-batch
items.description: set draft process/thread priority : 0-normal, 1-medium, 2-high, 3-realtime (default: 0)

items.name: --spec-draft-override-tensor
items.description: override tensor buffer type for draft model

items.name: --spec-draft-cpu-moe
items.description:
keep all Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights in the CPU for the draft model
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_CPU_MOE)

items.name: --spec-draft-n-cpu-moe
items.description:
keep the Mixture of Experts (MoE) weights of the first N layers in the CPU for the draft model
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_N_CPU_MOE)

items.name: --spec-draft-n-max
items.description:
number of tokens to draft for speculative decoding (default: 3)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_N_MAX)

items.name: --spec-draft-n-min
items.description:
minimum number of draft tokens to use for speculative decoding (default: 0)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_N_MIN)

items.name: --spec-draft-p-split
items.description:
speculative decoding split probability (default: 0.10)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_P_SPLIT)

items.name: --spec-draft-p-min
items.description:
minimum speculative decoding probability (greedy) (default: 0.00)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_P_MIN)

items.name: --spec-draft-backend-sampling
items.description:
offload draft sampling to the backend (default: enabled)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_BACKEND_SAMPLING)

items.name: --spec-draft-device
items.description:
comma-separated list of devices to use for offloading the draft model (none = don't offload)
use --list-devices to see a list of available devices

items.name: --spec-draft-ngl
items.description:
max. number of draft model layers to store in VRAM, either an exact number, 'auto', or 'all' (default: auto)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_N_GPU_LAYERS_DRAFT)

items.name: --spec-draft-model
items.description:
draft model for speculative decoding (default: unused)
(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_MODEL)

items.name: --spec-type
items.description:
comma-separated list of types of speculative decoding to use (default: none)

(env: LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_TYPE)

items.name: --spec-ngram-mod-n-min
items.description: minimum number of ngram tokens to use for ngram-based speculative decoding (default: 48)

items.name: --spec-ngram-mod-n-max
items.description: maximum number of ngram tokens to use for ngram-based speculative decoding (default: 64)

items.name: --spec-ngram-mod-n-match
items.description: ngram-mod lookup length (default: 24)

items.name: --spec-ngram-simple-size-n
items.description: ngram size N for ngram-simple speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram (default: 12)

items.name: --spec-ngram-simple-size-m
items.description: ngram size M for ngram-simple speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram (default: 48)

items.name: --spec-ngram-simple-min-hits
items.description: minimum hits for ngram-simple speculative decoding (default: 1)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k-size-n
items.description: ngram size N for ngram-map-k speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram (default: 12)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k-size-m
items.description: ngram size M for ngram-map-k speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram (default: 48)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k-min-hits
items.description: minimum hits for ngram-map-k speculative decoding (default: 1)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k4v-size-n
items.description: ngram size N for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding, length of lookup n-gram (default: 12)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k4v-size-m
items.description: ngram size M for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding, length of draft m-gram (default: 48)

items.name: --spec-ngram-map-k4v-min-hits
items.description: minimum hits for ngram-map-k4v speculative decoding (default: 1)

items.name: --draft
items.description:
the argument has been removed. use --spec-draft-n-max or --spec-ngram-mod-n-max
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DRAFT_MAX)

items.name: --draft-min
items.description:
the argument has been removed. use --spec-draft-n-min or --spec-ngram-mod-n-min
(env: LLAMA_ARG_DRAFT_MIN)

items.name: --spec-ngram-size-n
items.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-size-n or --spec-ngram-mod-n-match

items.name: --spec-ngram-size-m
items.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-size-m

items.name: --spec-ngram-min-hits
items.description: the argument has been removed. use the respective --spec-ngram-*-min-hits

items.name: --model-vocoder
items.description: vocoder model for audio generation (default: unused)

items.name: --tts-use-guide-tokens
items.description: Use guide tokens to improve TTS word recall

items.name: --embd-gemma-default
items.description: use default EmbeddingGemma model (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-1
items.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 1.5B (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-3b-default
items.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-7b-default
items.description: use default Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-7b-spec
items.description: use Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B + 0.5B draft for speculative decoding (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-14b-spec
items.description: use Qwen 2.5 Coder 14B + 0.5B draft for speculative decoding (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --fim-qwen-30b-default
items.description: use default Qwen 3 Coder 30B A3B Instruct (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --gpt-oss-20b-default
items.description: use gpt-oss-20b (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --gpt-oss-120b-default
items.description: use gpt-oss-120b (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --vision-gemma-4b-default
items.description: use Gemma 3 4B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --vision-gemma-12b-default
items.description: use Gemma 3 12B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)

items.name: --spec-default
items.description: enable default speculative decoding config
